hero.description: We transform complex datasets into actionable insights, empowering your organization to make data-driven decisions with confidence.

about.label: About Us
about.heading: We speak the language of data
about.description: With over a decade of combined expertise in data engineering, machine learning, and business intelligence, we help organizations unlock the true potential of their data.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.narrative: Mentarix Data Studio is a specialized data engineering and AI consultancy. Over the past 5 years, we have helped 20+ organizations across 10 industries transform raw data into measurable business outcomes — from building petabyte-scale pipelines to deploying production ML models.

differentiators.title: End-to-End Ownership
differentiators.description: From data infrastructure to AI deployment, one team handles the entire stack.

differentiators.title: Production-Grade Engineering
differentiators.description: We build systems that run reliably at scale, not just prototypes.

differentiators.title: Cross-Industry Expertise
differentiators.description: Proven solutions across fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, manufacturing, and more.

dataEngineering.title: Data Engineering
dataEngineering.description: Scalable pipelines, cloud-native infrastructure, and real-time streaming at petabyte scale.

aiMl.title: AI / Machine Learning
aiMl.description: Custom models from NLP to computer vision, trained on your data and deployed to production.

analytics.title: Data Analytics
analytics.description: Interactive dashboards and deep-dive analysis that turn numbers into strategic decisions.

strategy.title: Strategy & Consulting
strategy.description: Data roadmaps, architecture reviews, and organizational transformation guidance.

services.title: Data Engineering
services.description: Build scalable data pipelines and infrastructure that handle billions of data points with zero downtime.

services.title: Machine Learning
services.description: Deploy custom ML models that learn from your data and improve over time, automating complex decisions.

services.title: Data Analytics
services.description: Transform raw data into visual stories that reveal hidden patterns and drive strategic decisions.

services.title: AI Integration
services.description: Seamlessly integrate AI capabilities into your existing systems, from LLMs to computer vision.

services.title: Data Strategy
services.description: Define a clear data roadmap aligned with your business goals, from collection to insight.

services.title: Consulting
services.description: Expert guidance on data architecture, technology selection, and organizational transformation.

projects.title: Stock Multi-Agent Financial Analyzer
projects.description: Financial analysis platform combining an LLM Gateway with Playwright browser automation. Multi-agent collaboration across news, finance, trader, and data agents with Safety Guard and full artifact traceability.

projects.title: Maritime High-Risk & Anomaly Prediction
projects.description: Integrated national weather, vessel static data, and real-time AIS streams into ClickHouse and deep learning to predict grounding and anomalous behaviors and help prevent maritime incidents.

projects.title: Disrupted Time-Series Forecasting
projects.description: Compared SARIMA, Holt-Winters, and Prophet under COVID-19 disruptions. Designed three experimental groups to quantify the impact of external shocks on time-series forecasting accuracy.

projects.title: Slot Game Engine & Probability Optimizer
projects.description: 3x3 slot game engine combining Monte Carlo simulation with heuristic search to auto-optimize reel configurations under RTP 95% and win rate constraints. Full-stack with FastAPI backend and React frontend.

projects.title: AutoLLM — No-Code RAG Chatbot Platform
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform with document upload, vector retrieval, multi-LLM switching, dual-layer Redis + PostgreSQL storage, and Docker microservice deployment.

steps.title: Consulting
steps.description: Initial consultation to understand your business context, data maturity, and strategic objectives.

steps.title: Requirements Interview
steps.description: In-depth stakeholder interviews to capture detailed functional and technical requirements.

steps.title: Requirements Specification
steps.description: Formalize requirements into a comprehensive specification document with acceptance criteria and project scope.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: Agile development with iterative delivery, continuous testing, and regular progress reviews.

steps.title: Final Analysis Report
steps.description: Comprehensive project closure report with performance metrics, insights, and recommendations for future optimization.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.heading: Start a project with us
contact.description: Whether you're looking to optimize your data infrastructure or unlock new insights, we're ready to help.

success.title: Message Sent
success.message: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
